problem.description: User observes /vp-auto with no arguments seems to stop ('break') after every task; verify if spec requires this.
symptoms: Unclear whether missing VP_ARGS implies control point each task

hypotheses.description: Workflow explicitly mandates stop after each task when VP_ARGS is empty
Design (manual verify, control points, conversational prompts) causes frequent pauses without --fast
Chat turn limits / model behavior end turn after one task

tests_run.output: No flag 'stop-per-task'; --fast skips optional verifications only

findings: Skill requires numbered options at control points; Verify includes manual/ask user
Task contract block stops implementation if sections missing (not generic per-task break)
If all phases complete, step 2 exits to COMPLETE banner without task loop

resolution.root_cause: Not a single boolean 'no-args => break each task' rule: spec encourages control points, manual verification when present, and state/git rituals per task; LLM sessions often end one task per turn.
resolution.fix_applied: Documentation-only in debug session; optional follow-up: clarify in vp-auto skill that --fast reduces optional verify pauses
resolution.verification: Static review of autonomous.md and SKILL.md
